name: Accending Titans
description: Accending Titans is a modern digital finance platform that empowers individuals and businesses with secure USD accounts, virtual dollar cards, seamless money transfers, and everyday payment solutions.

offers.name: USD Accounts
offers.description: Receive, hold, and manage US Dollar payments conveniently from clients, businesses, and international platforms.

offers.name: Virtual Dollar Cards
offers.description: Secure virtual USD cards for international online payments, subscriptions, advertising, e-commerce, and global transactions.

offers.name: Virtual Top-Up Services
offers.description: Buy airtime, mobile data, electricity tokens, TV subscriptions, examination pins, and more at competitive rates.

offers.name: Airtime to Cash Conversion
offers.description: Instantly convert excess airtime into cash directly within the platform.

offers.name: Wallet Transfers
offers.description: Fast and secure transfers between Accending Titans users.

offers.name: Bank Transfers
offers.description: Send funds seamlessly to local and external bank accounts.
